## Purpose
This file serves as an example configuration for the DiffDoc tool, outlining the structure and options available for users to customize their setup.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users will observe a JSON structure that defines various settings for the DiffDoc tool, including schema references, directory paths, AI provider configurations, and model specifications.

## Business Rules
The configuration specifies rules such as the base directory for DiffDoc, the AI provider to use (local or cloud), and the models for local and cloud processing. It also allows for the inclusion and exclusion of specific file patterns.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
Inputs include configuration values such as directory paths, model names, and API keys. Outputs are not directly generated by this file but influence the behavior of the DiffDoc tool based on the provided settings.

## Operational Notes
This configuration file is intended for local development and testing, with specific endpoints for local AI services. Users should ensure that the specified endpoints are accessible and that the necessary models are available for use.
